channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: 20% Fee On All Cargo, Iran Blockade: Trump's New Hormuz Plan
item.description: The US president asserted that the strait is open and added that the US is reinstating the blockade to stop Iranian ships from entering or leaving the country.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1127024/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>The US president asserted that the strait is open and added that the US is reinstating the blockade to stop Iranian ships from entering or leaving the country.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | Trump's Quiet Turkey 'U-Turn' Has Loud Consequences For India
item.description: In a stunning policy reversal, Trump has decided to sell America's F-35 jets to Turkey, a staunch Pakistan ally and its closest defence supplier
item.content:encoded: In a stunning policy reversal, Trump has decided to sell America's F-35 jets to Turkey, a staunch Pakistan ally and its closest defence supplier

item.title: 1 Killed In Maine Shooting Involving ICE, State House Speaker Says

media:content.media:description: ICE had a significant presence in Maine earlier this year.

item.description: Immigration officials said in late January that they had ceased "enhanced operations" in Maine after making hundreds of arrests.
item.content:encoded: Immigration officials said in late January that they had ceased "enhanced operations" in Maine after making hundreds of arrests.

item.title: Video: US Strikes Iranian Submarine Centre Using Sea Drones For First Time

media:content.media:description: The strikes come at a time the US and Iran are exchanging fresh attacks on each other.

item.description: Three Corsair unmanned surface vessels carried out the strike at the crucial Bandar Abbas port. This was the first time American forces have employed sea drones in combat operations.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1127083/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Three Corsair unmanned surface vessels carried out the strike at the crucial Bandar Abbas port. This was the first time American forces have employed sea drones in combat operations.

item.title: Russian 'Doomsday' Plane Lands In Iran Amid Conflict, Sparks Curiosity

media:content.media:description: This aircraft has often been spotted accompanying the delegation of high-ranking Russian officials.

item.description: Often referred to in the news media as the "Doomsday Plane", the Tu-214PU serves primarily as a specialised, hardened communications node rather than Russia's primary nuclear-survivable airborne command platform.
item.content:encoded: Often referred to in the news media as the "Doomsday Plane", the Tu-214PU serves primarily as a specialised, hardened communications node rather than Russia's primary nuclear-survivable airborne command platform.

item.title: Decades Of Silence, Then $407 Million Answer: Japan Is Building A Spy Agency

media:content.media:description: The agency is on track to be up and running by December.

item.description: At the heart of it all is Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi, who sees a new domestic agency as central to her broader ambition of freeing Japan from the security constraints it has carried since the Second World War.
item.content:encoded: At the heart of it all is Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi, who sees a new domestic agency as central to her broader ambition of freeing Japan from the security constraints it has carried since the Second World War.

item.title: US Senator Lindsey Graham's Sudden Death Fuel 'Assassination' Speculation

media:content.media:description: The speculation began because Graham had recently returned from Ukraine.

item.description: The Republican veteran, one of US President Donald Trump's closest allies and a leading voice on US foreign policy, died on Saturday.
item.content:encoded: The Republican veteran, one of US President Donald Trump's closest allies and a leading voice on US foreign policy, died on Saturday.

item.title: Man Behind Bangladesh's Tallest Ram Statue Arrested On Fraud Charges

media:content.media:description: Haridas Chandra Tarani Das was arrested in the late hours of July 12.

item.description: Das, who had proposed building an 81-foot statue of Lord Ram at the Sri Sri Radha Gobinda Kali Temple in Palashbari in Gaibandha, has been arrested in a money laundering case involving suspicious financial transactions worth Tk9.35 crore.
item.content:encoded: Das, who had proposed building an 81-foot statue of Lord Ram at the Sri Sri Radha Gobinda Kali Temple in Palashbari in Gaibandha, has been arrested in a money laundering case involving suspicious financial transactions worth Tk9.35 crore.

item.title: Trump's Iran War Closed Hormuz Strait. Now He Wants 'Fee' For Guarding It

media:content.media:description: Trump said Iranian leaders had taken part in an 11-hour round of negotiations.

item.description: Trump said the US had effectively been guarding the strait "for nothing" up to now, but that this would change, with wealthy nations expected to pay for the arrangement going forward.
item.content:encoded: Trump said the US had effectively been guarding the strait "for nothing" up to now, but that this would change, with wealthy nations expected to pay for the arrangement going forward.

item.title: Iranian Plane Carrying Houthi Delegation Lands In Yemen Despite Strikes

media:content.media:description: Houthi broadcaster al-Masirah says plane was carrying official delegation of the Republic of Yemen.

item.description: The Houthi group did not specify where the plane landed.
item.content:encoded: The Houthi group did not specify where the plane landed.

item.title: UK Plans To Ban Iran's Elite Guards Over Threat To National Security

media:content.media:description: The announcement comes after several antisemitic attacks struck London

item.description: The banned groups would also include proxies and volunteers of Russia's GRU military intelligence agency, and the Islamic Movement of Companions of the Right (IMCR), an Iran-linked group which has claimed attacks on Jewish properties in London.
item.content:encoded: The banned groups would also include proxies and volunteers of Russia's GRU military intelligence agency, and the Islamic Movement of Companions of the Right (IMCR), an Iran-linked group which has claimed attacks on Jewish properties in London.

item.title: Aircraft Battling Colorado Wildfire Crashes, Pilot Dead

media:content.media:description: The aircraft was reported down Sunday in the Silver Jack Reservoir.

item.description: The pilot, believed to be the only person on board, was assisting firefighters with the 2-week-old Gold Mountain Fire
item.content:encoded: The pilot, believed to be the only person on board, was assisting firefighters with the 2-week-old Gold Mountain Fire

item.title: Bangkok Authorities Launch Probe Into Bar Fire That Killed 27

media:content.media:description: The government has promised financial support for the victims of the fire.

item.description: More than 70 people were injured following the blaze on Sunday evening, officials say
item.content:encoded: More than 70 people were injured following the blaze on Sunday evening, officials say

item.title: Viral Video Captures Terrifying Moment Russian Helicopter Gun Goes Out Of Control

media:content.media:description: The gun is designed for the Mi-24 attack helicopters.

item.description: In this particular video, the gun seems to have been bolted onto a truck bed to serve as a ground-based air-defence weapon to counter drones.
item.content:encoded: In this particular video, the gun seems to have been bolted onto a truck bed to serve as a ground-based air-defence weapon to counter drones.

item.title: Former Athens Olympic Hall Destroyed By Fire

media:content.media:description: Athens 2004 Olympics saw historic exploits in tracking and pole vault among others

item.description: The fire started late Sunday, and it took until early Monday to control the flames
item.content:encoded: The fire started late Sunday, and it took until early Monday to control the flames

item.title: White House To Push Companies To Ensure AI Doesn't Hike Power Bills: Report

media:content.media:description: The White House has argued that consumers should not bear the financial burden of AI's Growth (File)

item.description: Surging demand from power-hungry data centres has prompted consumer advocates to warn that households could end up subsidising grid upgrades.
item.content:encoded: Surging demand from power-hungry data centres has prompted consumer advocates to warn that households could end up subsidising grid upgrades.

item.title: OpenAI Doubles Bounty Reward To $50,000 In Safety Push

media:content.media:description: The goal is to identify and fix AI safety vulnerabilities before they can be exploited

item.description: The company is expanding its specialised Bio Bug Bounty Program to uncover vulnerabilities that could bypass safety guardrails in its most advanced AI models.
item.content:encoded: The company is expanding its specialised Bio Bug Bounty Program to uncover vulnerabilities that could bypass safety guardrails in its most advanced AI models.

item.title: Why Nepal's GenZ Is Again On Streets Against PM They Elected Just Months Ago

media:content.media:description: Balendra Shah was elected mayor in 2022.

item.description: On Sunday, hundreds of people took to the streets outside the Singhdurbar Secretariat, a government office in the capital. Many of them carried placards with slogans like 'End atrocity against the poor' and 'Respect human rights.'
item.content:encoded: On Sunday, hundreds of people took to the streets outside the Singhdurbar Secretariat, a government office in the capital. Many of them carried placards with slogans like 'End atrocity against the poor' and 'Respect human rights.'

item.title: US-Iran War Live Updates: US, Iran Both Claim Control Of Strait Of Hormuz As Tensions Escalate
item.description: US-Iran War Live Updates: The flare-up is the latest to undermine an interim agreement between Washington and Tehran aimed at ending their war, which has caused global economic shockwaves since it began in late February.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War Live Updates: The flare-up is the latest to undermine an interim agreement between Washington and Tehran aimed at ending their war, which has caused global economic shockwaves since it began in late February.

item.title: Blocked Door, People On Fire: Witnesses Recount Bangkok Club Blaze Horror

media:content.media:description: It was the deadliest fire in Thailand in over two decades.

item.description: Footage posted on social media showed panicked customers -- some with their clothes and hair on fire -- screaming as they fled through the flame-enveloped front door of the bar.
item.content:encoded: Footage posted on social media showed panicked customers -- some with their clothes and hair on fire -- screaming as they fled through the flame-enveloped front door of the bar.
